reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza el hospedaje del Aca, recomiendo dormir del lado de Dionicio cequeira

(Translated by Google)
The Aca lodging is a disgrace, I recommend sleeping on Dionicio Cequeira's side.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndW8zMmt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar para pasar la noche. Arquitectura de los 70. Hotel básico.  Cocheras descubiertas. Pero con tranquilidad por la estacion de servicio que tienen en la entrada.

(Translated by Google)
A place to spend the night. 1970s architecture. Basic hotel. Open-air parking. But peaceful thanks to the gas station at the entrance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbTdYT09BEAE
